seoTitle: How to Add Video to Your Wix Website
metaDescription: Learn how to embed video on Wix, whether uploading a file directly or linking from YouTube or Vimeo, with playback settings.
intro: Video content can make a Wix site feel far more dynamic, whether you're showing product demos or a portfolio reel. This guide covers adding a video element to your page, choosing between direct file upload and embedding from platforms like YouTube or Vimeo, and configuring playback behavior like autoplay and looping.

steps.heading: Open your target page
steps.body: In the Wix editor, navigate to the page section where you want to add video.

steps.heading: Open the Video and Music category
steps.body: From the Add Elements sidebar, find the Video and Music component category.

steps.heading: Add your video
steps.body: Choose between uploading a file directly (MP4, QuickTime) or embedding a URL from YouTube, Vimeo, or Dailymotion.

steps.heading: Configure playback settings
steps.body: Set up autoplay, looping, and mute behavior in the video settings submenu.

steps.heading: Adjust the visual framing
steps.body: Customize thumbnail covers, overlay skins, and control visibility to match your design.

steps.heading: Check mobile scaling and preview
steps.body: Toggle the mobile editor to recalibrate video sizing, then preview playback before publishing.

faq.question: Should I upload a video file directly or embed from YouTube?
faq.answer: Embedding from a platform like YouTube is often lighter for page load speed, while direct upload keeps viewers from leaving your site to watch.

faq.question: Can I set a video to autoplay in the background?
faq.answer: Yes, background video behaviors including autoplay, looping, and muting can all be configured in the video settings.

faq.question: Will my video look right on mobile?
faq.answer: Check the mobile editor separately, since video scaling and placement can differ from the desktop view.

faq.question: Can I hide playback controls for a cleaner look?
faq.answer: Yes, playback control visibility is one of the customizable video settings you can toggle off for a cleaner presentation.
